'''wohagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labelized|labelized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labelized|labelized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wohagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohagithi|wohagithi]] || [[word:wohagiji|wohagiji]] || [[word:wohagishi|wohagishi]] || [[word:wohagiki|wohagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohaguthuthu|wohaguthuthu]] || [[word:wohagujuju|wohagujuju]] || [[word:wohagushushu|wohagushushu]] || [[word:wohagukuku|wohagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohaguthu|wohaguthu]] || [[word:wohaguju|wohaguju]] || [[word:wohagushu|wohagushu]] || [[word:wohaguku|wohaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohagufthuf|wohagufthuf]] || [[word:wohagufjuf|wohagufjuf]] || [[word:wohagufshuf|wohagufshuf]] || [[word:wohagufkuf|wohagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohagethe|wohagethe]] || [[word:wohageje|wohageje]] || [[word:wohageshe|wohageshe]] || [[word:wohageke|wohageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohagothotho|wohagothotho]] || [[word:wohagojojo|wohagojojo]] || [[word:wohagoshosho|wohagoshosho]] || [[word:wohagokoko|wohagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohagotho|wohagotho]] || [[word:wohagojo|wohagojo]] || [[word:wohagosho|wohagosho]] || [[word:wohagoko|wohagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohagofthof|wohagofthof]] || [[word:wohagofjof|wohagofjof]] || [[word:wohagofshof|wohagofshof]] || [[word:wohagofkof|wohagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfthÃŸf|wohagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfjÃŸf|wohagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfshÃŸf|wohagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfkÃŸf|wohagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|wohagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|wohagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|wohagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|wohagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfthÃŸf|wohagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfjÃŸf|wohagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfshÃŸf|wohagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfkÃŸf|wohagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfthÃŸf|wohagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfjÃŸf|wohagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfshÃŸf|wohagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:wohagÃŸfkÃŸf|wohagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wohagÃḊthÃḊ|wohagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:wohagÃḊjÃḊ|wohagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:wohagÃḊshÃḊ|wohagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:wohagÃḊkÃḊ|wohagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wohagathatha|wohagathatha]] || [[word:wohagajaja|wohagajaja]] || [[word:wohagashasha|wohagashasha]] || [[word:wohagakaka|wohagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wohagatha|wohagatha]] || [[word:wohagaja|wohagaja]] || [[word:wohagasha|wohagasha]] || [[word:wohagaka|wohagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wohagafthaf|wohagafthaf]] || [[word:wohagafjaf|wohagafjaf]] || [[word:wohagafshaf|wohagafshaf]] || [[word:wohagafkaf|wohagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wohagasha|wohagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohagshÃḋsha|wohagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohagrosha|wohagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohagmusha|wohagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohagyasha|wohagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohagnkshÃḋsha|gowohagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohagnkrosha|gowohagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohagnkmusha|gowohagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohagnkyasha|gowohagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wohahagasha|wohahagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohahagshÃḋsha|wohahagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohahagrosha|wohahagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohahagmusha|wohahagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohahagyasha|wohahagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohahagnkshÃḋsha|gowohahagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohahagnkrosha|gowohahagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohahagnkmusha|gowohahagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohahagnkyasha|gowohahagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wehÃḊgasha|wehÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wehÃḊgshÃḋsha|wehÃḊgshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wehÃḊgrosha|wehÃḊgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wehÃḊgmusha|wehÃḊgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wehÃḊgyasha|wehÃḊgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowehÃḊgnkshÃḋsha|gowehÃḊgnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowehÃḊgnkrosha|gowehÃḊgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowehÃḊgnkmusha|gowehÃḊgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowehÃḊgnkyasha|gowehÃḊgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wohfagasha|wohfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wohfagshÃḋsha|wohfagshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wohfagrosha|wohfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wohfagmusha|wohfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wohfagyasha|wohfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowohfagnkshÃḋsha|gowohfagnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowohfagnkrosha|gowohfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowohfagnkmusha|gowohfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowohfagnkyasha|gowohfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
